Extended the full `DynamicEffectRegistry.test.tsx` file to include `customSeed: 42` and verified it passes through in the result alongside coerced schema params.","files_changed":["/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/effects/validateParams.ts","/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/effects/DynamicEffectRegistry.test.tsx"],"commands_run":["npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/effects/DynamicEffectRegistry.test.tsx"]},{"task_id":"T2","status":"done","executor_notes":"Added `schemasEqual(a?, b?)` and applied it at all three schema-comparison call sites in `register()` and `registerAsync()`. Expanded the full registry test file to verify no extra notification fires for a structurally equal but referentially distinct schema, while a genuinely changed schema still triggers notification.","files_changed":["/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/effects/DynamicEffectRegistry.ts","/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/effects/DynamicEffectRegistry.test.tsx"],"commands_run":["npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/effects/DynamicEffectRegistry.test.tsx"]},{"task_id":"T3","status":"done","executor_notes":"Imported `getEffectRegistry` into `useEffectRegistry` and guarded `replaceEffectRegistry(registry)` with `if (getEffectRegistry() !== registry)`. Verified the export exists and the guard uses correct reference equality for the memoized registry instance; no dedicated automated test exists in this batch.","files_changed":["/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useEffectRegistry.ts"],"commands_run":["npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/effects/DynamicEffectRegistry.test.tsx"]},{"task_id":"T4","status":"done","executor_notes":"Changed `EffectLayerSequence` to compute `inner` and skip the extra `<Sequence from={-startFrame}>` wrapper when `startFrame === 0`, while still passing `inner` through `wrapWithEffect`. Verified the updated render path by inspection; no dedicated automated test exists in this batch.","files_changed":["/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/compositions/EffectLayerSequence.tsx"],"commands_run":["npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/effects/DynamicEffectRegistry.test.tsx"]}],"sense_check_acknowledgments":[{"sense_check_id":"SC1","executor_note":"Yes. Starting the reducer from `{ ...(params ?? {}) }` preserves unknown keys, and later reducer assignments still overwrite known schema keys with validated/coerced values."},{"sense_check_id":"SC2","executor_note":"Yes. `schemasEqual` is used in `register`, the `registerAsync` early return, and the `registerAsync` pending staleness check. The updated test covers both the structural-equality no-fire case and the genuinely changed schema fire case."},{"sense_check_id":"SC3","executor_note":"Yes. `getEffectRegistry` is already exported from the effects index, and `getEffectRegistry() !== registry` is the correct identity guard because `registry` comes from `useMemo`."},{"sense_check_id":"SC4","executor_note":"Yes. `inner` is what gets passed to `wrapWithEffect`, and there is no remaining code path in `EffectLayerSequence` that depends on always rendering a zero-offset `Sequence` wrapper."}]}
